items.name: McCrispy
items.description: Golden, crispy and delicious, made with 100% chicken breast fillet, creamy lemon pepper mayo, freshly slice lettuce on a soft toasted potato bun.  Once you hear the crunch, you can’t unhear it.

items.name: Blueberry & Cheesecake Pie
items.description: Blueberry Cheesecake Pie is a crispy, golden-brown pie that has blueberry and cheesecake filling.

items.name: Pie Ala Mode -Blueberry & Cheesecake
items.description: Blueberry Cheesecake Pie Ala mode is a crispy, golden-brown pie that has blueberry and cheesecake filling. Served with Ice-cream and topped with a blueberry topping.

items.name: 20pc Chicken McNuggets
items.description: Our tender, juicy Halal Chicken McNuggets are made with 100% white meat chicken and no artificial colours, flavours and now no artificial preservatives. chicken McNuggets® served with a choice of one sauce:(Jalapeno, BBQ, Sweet and Sour).

items.name: Spanish Latte
items.description: An espresso-based drink filled with hot steamed creamy milk creating 1cm layer of foam to the rim of the cup with all-new condense milk flavour.

items.name: Grimace Shake
items.description: The Grimace Shake is a rich creamy blend with hints of sweet berry flavors(Blueberry and Raspberry, topped with Cream and sprinkles.

items.name: Regular Waffle Fries
items.description: Waffle Fries add a delicious twist on our classic fries, featuring a unique crisp-cut design that perfectly captures seasoning and flavour. Made from premium-grade potatoes, these golden Waffle Fries are crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside, offering a satisfying crunch with every bite.

items.name: Chilli Cheese McFlavor Fries
items.description: Chilli Cheese McFlavour Fries is made of our famous French Fries, fluffy on the inside, golden brown, and crispy on the outside topped with creamy, spicy sauces and jalapeno pieces.

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Fully cooked 100% breast meat seasoned with crispy breading, making them crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside. Available in 2 or 4-pieces.

items.name: Iced Latte Hazelnut
items.description: Refreshingly cool and made with 100% Arabica beans and milk, with a choice of flavoured syrups.

items.name: Iced Latte Vanilla
items.description: Refreshingly cool and made with 100% Arabica beans and milk, with a choice of flavoured syrups.

items.name: Homestyle Doughnut
items.description: Sweeten the deal with our Homestyle Doughnut. Delicious anytime treats.

items.name: Boerie

items.name: Big Mac®
items.description: Ever wondered what is on a Big Mac®? The McDonald's Big Mac® is a 100% beef burger with a taste like no other. The mouthwatering perfection starts with two 100% pure all beef patties and Big Mac® sauce sandwiched between a sesame seed bun. It is topped off with pickles, crisp shredded lettuce, finely chopped onion, and a slice of cheddar cheese. It contains no artificial flavours, preservatives, or added colours from artificial sources.

items.name: Cheeseburger
items.description: A juicy, 100% pure halal beef patty with absolutely no fillers, additives or preservatives, seasoned with a pinch of salt and pepper, and topped with a tangy pickle, chopped onions, ketchup, mustard, and a slice of melty cheese.

items.name: Chicken Burger
items.description: Looking for something simple? Try our breaded Halal chicken patty topped with lettuce and mayo and served on a perfectly toasted bun.

items.name: Chicken Foldover
items.description: Another way to enjoy our delicious chicken! Two Halal grilled chicken patties with lettuce, tomatoes, onions and flavourful garlic sauce held together by a Flatbread.
